CVE-2017-13736.title: There are lots of memory leaks in the GMCommand function in magic ...
CVE-2017-13736.description: There are lots of memory leaks in the GMCommand function in magick/command.c in GraphicsMagick 1.3.26 that will lead to a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2022-1270.title: In GraphicsMagick, a heap buffer overflow was found when parsing  ...
CVE-2022-1270.description: In GraphicsMagick, a heap buffer overflow was found when parsing MIFF.

CVE-2025-12474.title: A specially-crafted file can cause libjxl's decoder to read pixel ...
CVE-2025-12474.description:
A specially-crafted file can cause libjxl's decoder to read pixel data from uninitialized (but allocated) memory.

This can be done by causing the decoder to reference an outside-image-bound area in a subsequent patches. An incorrect optimization causes the decoder to omit populating those areas.

CVE-2025-27795.title: ReadJXLImage in JXL in GraphicsMagick before 1.3.46 lacks image d ...
CVE-2025-27795.description: ReadJXLImage in JXL in GraphicsMagick before 1.3.46 lacks image dimension resource limits.

CVE-2025-32460.title: GraphicsMagick before 8e56520 has a heap-based buffer over-read i ...
CVE-2025-32460.description: GraphicsMagick before 8e56520 has a heap-based buffer over-read in ReadJXLImage in coders/jxl.c, related to an ImportViewPixelArea call.

CVE-2026-1837.title: A specially-crafted file can cause libjxl's decoder to write pixe ...
CVE-2026-1837.description:
A specially-crafted file can cause libjxl's decoder to write pixel data to uninitialized unallocated memory. Soon after that data from another uninitialized unallocated region is copied to pixel data.

This can be done by requesting color transformation of grayscale images to another grayscale color space. Buffers allocated for 1-float-per-pixel are used as if they are allocated for 3-float-per-pixel. That happens only if LCMS2 is used as CMS engine. There is another CMS engine available (selected by build flags).
